description.value:
Trigger A non-dottari creature takes damage

Effect Thin Wisps fire off a series of fireworks as they rappel from the eaves on scarves. All creatures in area A must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save. On a failure, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Deafened] until the end of its next turn (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] and deafened on a critical failure). The hazard then rolls initiative.

details.description: Fashionable performers and revolutionaries rappel from the surrounding buildings on scarves.
details.disable: @Check[acrobatics|dc:21] to turn away from the explosions, or @Check[crafting|dc:25] to identify the exact moment the fireworks will explode
details.routine: (1 action; visual) The Thin Wisps continue to launch fireworks until the dottari excruciator divisions are defeated. Each round, all creatures must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:24|traits:visual] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Deafened] for 1 round (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] and deafened for 1 round on a critical failure).
